title: RateLimitResponse
description: The HTTP response returned by an API when a rate limit is exceeded, including error details and retry guidance.

status_code.description: HTTP status code of the rate limit response (typically 429).

error.description: Error code or name (e.g., RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, TOO_MANY_REQUESTS).

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining the rate limit violation.

limit.description: The rate limit that was exceeded.

remaining.description: Remaining requests allowed in the current window (typically 0 when rate limited).

reset_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rate limit window resets.

retry_after_seconds.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

documentation_url.description: URL to documentation about rate limits for this API.
